name: mipster
description: MIPster MIP solver development agent — C++ development, building, testing, experiments, and performance analysis

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== MIPster Dev Environment ===' && echo "Optimized build: ~/prog/cbc/bin/mipster" && test -x ~/prog/cbc/bin/mipster && echo 'Status: installed' || echo 'Status: not found — run ./configster --opt --install'
